reasoning: Task appears to be to produce a concise summary of the provided sports news snippet, highlighting the key facts mentioned: the 33-year-old Leicester City player with a new one-year deal and limited appearances; Taylor-Fletcher's goal tally; his move to Sheffield Wednesday ahead of a game vs Norwich.
output: Leicester City's 33-year-old player, who signed a one-year deal in the summer, has featured only twice this term; former Blackpool forward Taylor-Fletcher scored three goals in 23 games for his parent club last season and has joined Sheffield Wednesday ahead of Saturday’s Championship game against Norwich City.
